headline: A Small Upgrade Could Have a Big Impact for IDEXX Customers
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.76%, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ:IDXX) is among the 7 Best Pet Care Stocks to Buy for Consistent Recurring Revenue. On May 26, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ:IDXX) announced the expansion of its Fecal Dx antigen testing platform to include detection of taeniid tapeworm species, including Taenia and Echinococcus. The enhanced testing capability is […]
